title: ConflictExplanation
description: Per-agent 'why was this request blocked' record emitted by the branch-and-bound search. CBS-lite contribution: surface-level diagnostics, not algorithmic conflict-tree state. Stable as of v1.

blocked_agent_id.description: Agent that the search refused to admit.

reason_code.description: Mirrors PlanWithSchedulerResult.reason_code so callers can dispatch on a single closed set.

blocking_agents.description: Agent ids whose existing holds blocked the request, in deterministic sorted order.

blocking_resources.description: Resource ids on the blocked agent's path that were already held.

detail.description: Free-form human-readable explanation. Empty string when no detail was attached.
